stimulus: Filmmaker Agnès Varda’s short documentaries are widely admired for their inventive style. However, several of the ______blank of city streets were originally commissioned not as art but as commercials; a tourism agency had hired Varda to shoot promotional footage of various French neighborhoods.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The convention being tested is the use of plural and possessive nouns. The singular possessive noun “director’s” and the plural noun “films” correctly indicate that one director made multiple films.

Choice A omits the possessive on “directors” and incorrectly adds one to “film’s.” Choice C uses the plural possessive “directors’” (implying more than one director) and incorrectly possessivizes “film’s.” Choice D incorrectly uses the singular possessive on both nouns.
